bailey_yi.name: Bailey Yi
bailey_yi.summary:
Bailey Yi is in the early chapters of what promises to be an exciting competitive journey, with 4 entries across 2 tournaments. The willingness to step onto the court and compete is where every great player starts.

Bailey is a versatile competitor who takes the court in singles, doubles, and mixed doubles. That willingness to compete across all disciplines builds a well-rounded game that many specialists simply cannot match.

bala_sabarish_venkatakrishnan.name: Bala Sabarish Venkatakrishnan
bala_sabarish_venkatakrishnan.summary:
Bala Sabarish Venkatakrishnan has shown serious competitive teeth, reaching the semifinals 1 time among 8 entries across 3 tournaments. Each deep run is a signal that this player belongs among the contenders.

A true triple-threat, Bala competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a doubles best of #3. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Bala has built strong chemistry with several partners:
  • Rajguru Reddy Are — 3 events in BD, best: #3

Bala has competed at both U13 and U15, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

bavish_dornala.name: Bavish Dornala
bavish_dornala.summary:
Bavish Dornala is just getting started on the junior badminton circuit with 2 tournament entries. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Bavish's.

Competing in both singles and doubles, Bavish is developing the kind of well-rounded game that pays dividends as the competition intensifies at higher levels.

bavish_reddi_dornala.name: Bavish Reddi Dornala
bavish_reddi_dornala.summary:
Bavish Reddi Dornala is a rising force in junior badminton, already collecting 2 tournament titles among 35 career entries across 14 tournaments. The trajectory is unmistakable — this is a player whose best chapters are still being written.

A true triple-threat, Bavish competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a singles best of #2, 1 doubles title, 1 mixed doubles title. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Bavish has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 7 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Nithesh Madishetti — a trusted BD partner (7 events, best result: #4)
  • Sunny Zheng — 4 events, 1 title together in BD

The 2025-2026 season has been a step up, with 2 titles across 4 tournaments — an improvement that shows Bavish is still ascending. The best may yet be ahead.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Bavish has competed across U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Bavish isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 2 titles to show for it, Bavish is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

bella_hu.name: Bella Hu []
bella_hu.summary: Bella Hu [] is just getting started on the junior badminton circuit with 1 tournament entry. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Bella's.

bella_liu.name: Bella Liu
bella_liu.summary:
Bella Liu is a U.S. Junior National Champion — a distinction that places Bella among the finest junior players in the country. With 15 career tournament victories across 25 tournaments and 72 total entries, this is a player who consistently rises to the biggest moments.

A true triple-threat, Bella competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 3 singles titles, 6 doubles titles, 4 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in GD U13 • National Finalist in XD U13 • 5 ORC titles (across 4 tournaments) • U.S. Selection Event top-1 finisher.

Bella has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 18 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Katherine F Xu — 9 events together in GD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Sophia Liu — 8 events together in GD/U13, producing an outstanding 4 titles
  • Enming Cao — 6 events, 1 title together in XD

The 2025-2026 season has been outstanding, with 5 podium finishes across 4 tournaments. Bella is playing some of the best badminton of the career right now.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Bella has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Bella has competed across 6 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 9 seeded entries across the career, Bella consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 15 titles to show for it, Bella is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Ben has competed across U15, U17 and U19, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning NorCal, SoCal, South, Ben isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 1 title to show for it, Ben is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
